D

Dataset - Class in org.gdal.gdal
Class Dataset is an uninstanciable class providing various methods to access a set of associated raster bands, usually from one file.

org.gdal.gdal - package org.gdal.gdal
Provides the classes necessary to handle GDAL rasters.
org.gdal.gdalconst - package org.gdal.gdalconst
Various constants used by the org.gdal.gdal package.
org.gdal.gnm - package org.gdal.gnm
 
org.gdal.ogr - package org.gdal.ogr
Provides the classes necessary to handle OGR vector datasources.
org.gdal.osr - package org.gdal.osr
Provides the classes necessary to handle spatial reference systems and transformation between them.

PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Class of error codes related to transformation on a specific coordinate.
PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_GRID_AT_NODATA - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Point to transform falls in a grid cell that evaluates to nodata.
PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_INVALID_COORD - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Invalid input coordinate. e.g a latitude > 90 deg.
PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_NO_OPERATION - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
No operation found, e.g if no match the required accuracy, or if ballpark transformations were asked to not be used and they would be only such candidate.
PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_OUTSIDE_GRID - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Point to transform falls outside grid/subgrid/TIN.
PROJ_ERR_COORD_TRANSFM_OUTSIDE_PROJECTION_DOMAIN - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Coordinate is outside of the projection domain. e.g approximate mercator with \|longitude - lon_0\| > 90 deg, or iterative convergence method failed.
PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Class of error codes typically related to coordinate operation initialization, typically when creating a PJ* object from a PROJ string.
PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_FILE_NOT_FOUND_OR_INVALID - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
File not found or with invalid content (particular case of PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_ILLEGAL_ARG_VALUE)
PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_ILLEGAL_ARG_VALUE - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
One of the operation parameter has an illegal value.
PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_MISSING_ARG - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Missing required operation parameter
PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_MUTUALLY_EXCLUSIVE_ARGS - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Mutually exclusive arguments.
PROJ_ERR_INVALID_OP_WRONG_SYNTAX - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Invalid pipeline structure, missing +proj argument, etc.
PROJ_ERR_OTHER - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Class of error codes that do not fit into one of the above class.
PROJ_ERR_OTHER_API_MISUSE - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Error related to a misuse of PROJ API.
PROJ_ERR_OTHER_NETWORK_ERROR - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
Failure when accessing a network resource.
PROJ_ERR_OTHER_NO_INVERSE_OP - Static variable in interface org.gdal.osr.osrConstants
No inverse method available.

SpatialReference - Class in org.gdal.osr
This class represents an OpenGIS Spatial Reference System, and contains methods for converting between this object organization and well known text (WKT) format.
